programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Michael thinks he has impressed Jo, only to learn that someone else in the office has caught her eye.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Homicide at Home
programme.desc: A love triangle gone awry leaves Mississippi investigators searching for who was holding the gun that killed Avis Banks and her unborn child.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Homicide at Home
programme.desc: A love triangle gone awry leaves Mississippi investigators searching for who was holding the gun that killed Avis Banks and her unborn child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Trying to Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Deep in Mexico's Baja desert lies the scorching wasteland of the Devil's Canyon. A Canadian mountain man teams up with an experienced homesteader to take on the canyon's triple-digit heat, scarce water, and venomous predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Philippine Jungle
programme.desc: In this Pop-Up Edition, a couple goes from their Idaho couch to the perilous jungles of the Philippines. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as relentless bugs, torrential rain and deadly boars put their survival skills to the test.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Earthquake in the Philippines
programme.desc: In this Pop-Up Edition, a thrill-seeking chef and competitive hockey mom are rattled by an earthquake in the Philippine jungle. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as territorial monkeys, hunger and dehydration nearly lead to their demise.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: Hypothermia threatens both a fan survivalist in the mountains of Bulgaria and a military duo in Ontario, Canada. The air is frigid and there are predators all around but unsuspected challenges prove to be their biggest threats.

programme.title: Naked Castaway: Stranded
programme.desc: The first man to walk the Amazon has to quickly establish his priorities of water, shelter, food and fire to have any chance of surviving his 60-day challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Teamwork Wins
programme.desc: A team of three takes on the jungles of Ecuador. Meanwhile, two sets of survivalists endure the jungles of Panama for ten days before joining forces to survive the remainder of their three-week challenge.

programme.title: Naked Castaway: Stranded
programme.desc: The first man to walk the Amazon has to quickly establish his priorities of water, shelter, food and fire to have any chance of surviving his 60-day challenge.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Ice Fortress
programme.desc: Images of earth from space reveal an intimate portrait of human activity; Cities glow bright while the wilderness remains dark; Why the Australian outback is lit up like a series of vast cities.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Vietnam's Lost POWs
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include desperate signs from lost veterans in Vietnam captured by satellite, a fleet of massive ships stranded in the middle of a vast desert and strange walls stretching vast distances across Northern California.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worse Than a Haunted House
programme.desc: One mother's battle with hoarding is overshadowed by the discovery of her own daughter's compulsion to hold on to things, while another mother is putting her family's unity on the line and her husband's life at risk with her own extreme hoarding problem.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: Geoffrey has already lost his home. Now, he has just 30 days to clear the clutter from the home or he will lose everything that remains inside it - including his two children.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Hoo, This Reeks!
programme.desc: Kathy's extreme hoarding forced her 12-year-old son to move out of their home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Not Taking My Kids
programme.desc: When Child Protection Services removes Karen's children from her home, she is given just 48 hours to clean up or risks losing custody of her kids permanently.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This Is Garbage Land
programme.desc: A compulsive hoarder and Elvis impersonator spends his days collecting Elvis memorabilia, which has left his apartment virtually uninhabitable.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Terry and Bill seem to be the perfect couple, but their dark secret has put their relationship in jeopardy. The tragic murder of her daughter drove Nancy to hoarding. Now, if she can't clear her home, she may just lose her husband as well.

programme.desc: Rhonda's home is filled with dumpster items and she has been forced to live in a camper in her backyard. Now, with neighbors threatening lawsuits and worse, Rhonda must clean up or risk losing everything.

programme.desc: A woman accidently calls Chandler when she is looking for her ex-boyfriend Bob when Chandler answers the phone in Bob's stead and fixes himself up on a date with her at the diner. Ross is reluctant to let Chandler hit on Jade, but Chandler has his way.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Babysitting, Joey and Chandler take baby Ben out on the town to help them attract women, but they lose him on the bus.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out
programme.desc: Ross becomes very upset when Rachel leaves a message saying that she is over him.

programme.desc: When Nonny, Gil and Zooli conjure a genie, she agrees to grant whoever brings her the most precious gift a wish. They think it might be a precious gem, but turns out it's friendship.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Super Baby!
programme.desc: When supervillain Ms. Goo Goo starts changing everyone into babies, it’s up to Guppy Girl and Bubble Boy to stop her before they get turned into babies too.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Jokers Playhouse
programme.desc: The guys have to keep a straight face as the other Jokers act out bizarre scenes, and then they try to get an embarrassing word in edgewise with strangers at the park.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown Medley

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Infusion
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub infused with international flavours. There's a meaty spot in Wilmington, Delaware, putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Unforgiving Sea
programme.desc: The fleet works with the Coast Guard to find survivors of a sunken fishing boat. Equipment failures plague the Northwestern and Cornelia Marie, and the Time Bandit and Maverick start fishing only to have one boat come up empty while the other fills pots.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Pain and Paybacks
programme.desc: After a deadly start, the Bering Sea is still claiming victims. Working in high seas, Deckhand Lenny Lakanoff of the Wizard suffers a crippling injury, leaving Captain Keith scrambling to shore.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Halfway through the season the grind is on. On all the boats the men are working 40 hours without sleep. Equipment failures, fatigue and bad weather are making fishing even more dangerous and men must deal with repairs and rescues.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Salvation

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Last Lap
programme.desc: The grinding 2006 Red King Crab fishing marathon comes to a close. Sig Hansen and the Northwestern crew finish a 30-hour grind and steam for port while Phil Harris of the Cornelia Mariem aka "the comeback kid" returns to Dutch injury free

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: New Beginnings

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Caught in the Storm
programme.desc: Only days into the Opilio season a major storm system arrives on the fishing grounds and high seas cause Captain Andy of the Time Bandit to call his men off deck moments before a rogue wave hits the starboard side.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Tragic Beginning
programme.desc: The largest fishing port in the United States continues to buzz with life as 81 fishing vessels return to start the 2006 Red King Crab season. Fishing high-liners like the Northwestern, Cornelia Marie, and Time Bandit return to stake their claim.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: Dogs 101: Kooikerhondje, Tibetan Mastif, Dandie Dinmont Terrier, Leonberger, Affenpin
programme.desc: The world's largest and smallest dog meet.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Lifted Lodge Treehouse
programme.desc: The NTS crew travels to an alpaca farm to build a lodge in the trees inspired by our National Parks. They create a structure to take in the mountain views with a 50 foot long cable bridge entrance and a deck devoted entirely to hammock lounging.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hot Tub Rumpus Room
programme.desc: Pete's fun-loving friend, and forklift supplier, is the lucky recipient of a treehouse built strictly for good times. The team builds a dream of a treehouse complete with a wine bar, a loft and their first ever hot tub in the woods of Western Washington.

programme.title: Tanked!: Popcorn on the High Seas
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are recruited by Westfield Mall to fabricate two tanks including a Navy-inspired sailboat aquarium to spice up the mall's new food court.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Giraffe
programme.desc: Rothschild's giraffe Orla has got the keepers guessing. She is about to give birth to her third calf, but is two weeks overdue. This episode captures the astonishing arrival of the giraffe family's youngest member and its introduction to the herd.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Down, Not Out
programme.desc: After Tia suffers a devastating injury, her kids have to step up to keep Villalobos running. Everyone's help is needed to catch an elusive dog in the middle of the night. And, a family of 8 needs a new companion to complete their active home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Redeemed
programme.desc: Earl returns from rehab, hoping to rebuild his life working with the dogs. A couple comes looking for a dog who can handle crowded streets of NYC. Lizzy rescues a dog after a confrontation with the owner who abandoned it.

programme.title: River Monsters: Death Ray
programme.desc: The Giant Freshwater Stingray in Thailand is armed with a venomous 10-inch barbed tail.

programme.desc: Frankie Lymon became a star due to his electrifying vocal performance and his charisma with women. He married three times in his short life. A court battle ensues after all three claim to be the widow of the doo-wop singer.

programme.desc: Whitfield family comes together for their first holiday together in four years.

programme.title: Movie: The Best Man Holiday
programme.desc: Old rivalries and old flames are rekindled when a group of college friends reunite at Christmas, after 15 years.

programme.desc: Martin and Gina move back in together, but there are too many belongings to fit.

programme.desc: Nikki and Andell infiltrate the L.A. Lakers' locker room to get an autograph from Shaq.

programme.title: The Parkers: Lights, Camera, Action
programme.desc: Nikki is angry when the star of a popular TV sitcom wins the affection of Prof. Oglevee.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Big Four-Oh
programme.desc: Vivian becomes obsessed with achieving her lifelong dream of being a professional dancer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: She Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: Will meets a girl whom he likes, but is ashamed to take her out because of her weight.

programme.title: Martin: Get a Job
programme.desc: Martin and Gina go undercover to try and discover what Tommy does for a living.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Martin: Lockin' Boots
programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself
programme.desc: Gina regrets the changes she was hired to make in Martin's show when Martin changes too.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: Nikki's dad is caught with Andell's mom, while Allen returns to Kim a changed man.

programme.title: The Parkers: Dead Clown Walking
programme.desc: A plan to lift Nikki's birthday blues by hiring a clown to appear at her party goes awry.

programme.title: Black-ish: Under the Influence
programme.desc: Jack is going through an experimental phase and getting himself into trouble, so Dre chaperones the twins' school dance to keep an eye on him. Meanwhile, Junior fights with his girlfriend after she thinks he spends too much time taking care of Devante.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good in the 'Hood
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda takes Jack and Diane to her part of town in a black neighbourhood and claims the twins are scared of their own community. Dre and Rhonda take them to a local diner to show them why it's so special.

programme.title: Black-ish: Relatively Grown Man
programme.desc: After Junior gets an offer for his dream job working with Migos, Dre and Bow are determined to convince him to return to college and get his degree.

programme.title: Black-ish: FriDre Night Lights
programme.desc: Dre is thrilled when Jack makes the football team, but Bow is against the idea. Meanwhile, Diane wants Junior to drive her to her first real date with Jalen, but Junior overstays his welcome.

programme.title: Black-ish: Is It Desert or Dessert
programme.desc: Dre has concerns about Jack and Diane spending the weekend with their friends' family in the desert. Meanwhile, Pops is forced to come to terms with how he treats women after he helps set Junior up.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Talk
programme.desc: Dre, disappointed that Bow has already given Andre Jr. 'the talk' because she thinks he's too big of a prude to do it, decides to rectify matters by giving his son his version of 'the talk.'

programme.title: Black-ish: The Nod
programme.desc: Dre sets out to expand Andre Jr's social circle to include more black kids after he discovers Andre Jr. is clueless about 'the nod.' Meanwhile, hoping to inspire little Diane to become a doctor, Rainbow takes her to work at the hospital.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crazy Mom
programme.desc: When Dre agrees to take over Rainbow's 'mom' duties for a week, the overwhelming praise he gets from everyone at his kids’ school goes to his head. He soon finds himself pushing the envelope to outdo everyone, even the school's 'crazy mom.'

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Movie: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In ancient times, a warrior sets out to stop an evil king from taking over the land.

programme.title: Movie: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: Alongside his stepfather, a young man goes in search of his missing grandfather on a mythical island.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government agent who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: Vagrant Queen: All Old Things Must Pass
programme.desc: The team arrive on Arriopa to take down Lazaro. A face from the past unexpectedly returns.

programme.title: Movie: Dante's Peak

programme.title: Movie: Hulk Vs.

programme.title: Movie: Planet Hulk
programme.desc: The Incredible Hulk awakes in a shuttle which crash lands on a distant planet. A tyrannical ruler enslaves the Hulk along with other prisoners, who must fight for their freedom in a coliseum.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: The team investigates a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert. The evidence at both scenes has the team drawing a correlation between the crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Ellie
programme.desc: With Grissom away, Warrick heads the investigation of the murder of a con artist who turns out to be involved with Brass' daughter. Meanwhile, the physical evidence in the case leads Sara to investigate a high-end counterfeit operation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Organ Grinder
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator. The team discovers that the scene has been tampered with and that the victim had been re-dressed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: You've Got Male
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara are called when two murder victims are found hidden in pipes at a construction site in the middle of an alfalfa field. Meanwhile, Catherine and Nick begin to doubt that a body found in the woods was the victim of a hunting accident.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the strangely theatrical crime scene of another victim left by serial killer Paul Millander. After discovering that all of his victims were born in the same month as Grissom, Gil realizes that Millander could be after him.

programme.title: Movie: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In ancient times, a warrior sets out to stop an evil king from taking over the land.

programme.title: Movie: Percy Jackson and the Olympians: The Lightning Thief
programme.desc: Someone has stolen the ultimate weapon: Zeus's lightning bolt. When Percy, the son of Poseidon, is accused of the theft, he must find and return the bolt to Zeus before the battle of the gods destroys the world. Along the way, he learns of his lineage.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Halfway into their five-year mission to explore uncharted space, the USS Enterprise is attacked by a mysterious new enemy. Escaping to the planet below, Kirk must join a stranger in fighting an impressive foe so that he can save his friends and home.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Community Calling
programme.desc: A couple debates the benefits of getting a home with more space for entertaining vs. making changes to their existing house so they can preserve memories with their kids.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Money Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an out-of-state seller looking to sell an old family home. it's a large house in original condition and could be a great flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Torrance, California that is not only in rough shape, but also has known foundation issues.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Split-level Falls
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a split-level home in Long Beach, California. The style is unique among the other homes in the neighbourhood and the small backyard is ripe for creating classic California-style indoor/outdoor living.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hot Market, Fast Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a house in an up-and-coming neighborhood of Garden Grove, California. With not too much work to be done, this house should be quick flip for them.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk-Pile Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a small home with big problems in Long Beach, CA. What seems like a great home reveals an avalanche of problems from the front door to the garage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: It's a Dump
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Lakewood, CA, near one of their previous flips. They hope to repeat their past success, but modernizing an old house comes with a high price tag.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: House Hunters: Year-round Christmas in Chicago
programme.desc: First time buyers in Chicago can't agree on whether to go for a standalone home that has the vintage details she wants, or a modern townhouse that gives him the tight knit community he remembers from his childhood.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Adventures in Noosa Hinterland
programme.desc: A freelance outdoor instructor wants to start an adventure business in Australia and, temped by the promise of days in the sun with their two children, his wife is onboard.

programme.title: House Hunters: Outnumbered by the In-Laws
programme.desc: Focuses on the emotional experience of finding and purchasing a new home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Return to Nature in Scotland
programme.desc: After living in close quarters in Amsterdam for several years, an adventurous expat family is hoping for more space in Scotland.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cat Nip Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by a realtor about an exciting new listing that's so new the realtor doesn't even have keys yet. If Tarek and Christina want to buy this house, they'll have to do so sight unseen.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fast Money Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina check out a home with a tight profit margin in Whittier, California. The house is in good shape though, and it shouldn't take much time or money to transform this property.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beached Bungalow
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a charming bungalow home on the edge of a historic Long Beach, California, neighbourhood. Christina loves the period details and design, while Tarek loves that the good condition of the interior could mean savings in the budget.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Old Time Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a turn-of-the-century home in a historic Santa Ana neighbourhood. Old homes always present unseen problems throughout the process and this home is no exception, but can Tarek and Christina handle the issues that come along with it?

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Classic Home vs. Eclectic Suite
programme.desc: Gary and Jerry win a large house at auction but must split the house in half in order to take it on the road. As they renovate the larger house, they enlist Gary's girls to help renovate the smaller piece as a mother-in-law suite.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Shotgun Shanty Vs. Hayhurst Brothers' Garden District Digs
programme.desc: The Hayhurst brothers win a house at auction, but after the move, unseen rot under the house leaves them with only half of it.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Rustic Ranch
programme.desc: The Snow Sisters win a large brick home at auction and Toni convinces Donna the finished product will be well worth the high bid at auction.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Gary's Girls' Seaside Set-Up vs. Randy's Sensible Studio
programme.desc: Gary's Girls win a house at auction but the land where they want to set up already has a small building on it that will either have to be moved or renovated.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Dutch Dwelling vs. Casey and Catrina's Cape Cod
programme.desc: After winning a modest home at auction, Paige and Raf team up with Casey and Catrina who recently acquired a lake house. The two teams come up with a combination and style that any homebuyer would love.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Brian and Mika work to keep the stress level low when Virginia empty nesters decide to build a house in Florida. She wants colour everywhere while he's imagining a white oasis, leaving Mika to find a compromise to create a home they can both love.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Jungle to Dream Oasis
programme.desc: Brian and Mika are challenged to turn an overgrown lot into a dream home for an expecting family. The homeowner is also a chef who has stipulations about his kitchen, meaning Brian and Mika have their work cut out for them to create the perfect property.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Thinking of the Future
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked with building a house for a physical therapist who dreams of having a space of her own. She has specific accessibility requests and hopes Mika and Brian can create a beautiful home that works for years to come.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: A Tale of Two Cories
programme.desc: A single dad and his daughter want to build a dream home and gain a sense of stability after renting for over a decade. The daughter is obsessed with the colour blue, so Mika must find a way to incorporate it into the design.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Key West Compromise
programme.desc: A couple calls on Brian and Mika to build a custom home on a gorgeous, lakefront lot. Brian and Mika are challenged to combine his desire for a fun, Key West, FL, paradise with her dream of a peaceful cottage oasis.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Home Before Baby
programme.desc: Brian and Mika feel the pressure as they build a custom dream home for an expecting couple whose baby arrives in just over 100 days.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Matrimony
programme.desc: While avenging her sister's death, Portia runs into a man with her sister's heirloom necklace, and a pregnant woman with her own agenda. Things take a sudden turn when the couple is kidnapped and Portia is forced to negotiate their release.

programme.title: Movie: A Predator's Obsession
programme.desc: After being saved from a shark attack by a brooding stranger, a young woman discovers she has reason to be suspicious.

programme.desc: A True-crime author and her husband take a vacation at her family's mansion on Crawford Island. She researches the murder of a woman for her next book. She begins to feel like she might be the next victim on this storied island.

programme.title: Below Deck: Naked Smoothies

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Creation of Man
programme.desc: Look at why we humans are so different from every other living thing on earth, and whether aliens come into play.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens, Plagues and Epidemics
programme.desc: Scientists are continually challenged by unidentified strains of bacteria with mysterious origins. Take a look at whether these strains could come from an extra terrestrial source.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Relics
programme.desc: All around the world, archaeologists have uncovered mysterious relics revered by ancient cultures for thousands of years. Now on display in museums, temples and churches, millions of people travel great distances just to be in their presence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Shamans
programme.desc: Throughout history, spiritual leaders known as shamans have healed, protected and advised their people. Whether they are simply putting on elaborate ceremonies or are in contact with extraterrestrial realms is investigated.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: NASA's Secret Agenda
programme.desc: When German aerospace engineer Wernher von Braun joined the U. S. military and space programs after World War II, he quickly became one of the foremost scientists.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Science Wars
programme.desc: Nearly every year discoveries are made that require revisions to history books. But there are numerous artifacts that are outright ignored because they don't fit into the accepted scientific paradigm. Explore some of these artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sea
programme.desc: Lurking in our oceans are creatures that defy explanation. Octopuses can edit their own DNA, animals are able to regenerate their entire brains, and jellyfish can literally live forever. Learn is they were delivered to Earth by extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Return
programme.desc: There is evidence that suggests we have experienced 20th century alien contact. In 1942 the US Military allegedly did battle with an alien spacecraft and WWII Allied Air Force planes were once buzzed by strange balls of light.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Area 52
programme.desc: A look at whether the notoriety of Area 51 is being used to cover up other experiments.

programme.desc: When the husband of a popular teacher’s aide is shot to death, the investigation uncovers infidelity, teenage hit men and an airtight alibi.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Charlene Childers and Timothy Dean

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kemia Hassel and Jeremy Cuellar
programme.desc: When a respected soldier is murdered on New Year's Eve, the quest for the truth reveals a deadly plot driven by temptation and obsession.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Deadly Path
programme.desc: When a woman falls to her death while hiking with her husband in Rocky Mountain National Park, rangers question if her death was an accident or a heinous act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Haunting
programme.desc: Police believed a pair of double homicides in Nebraska, five years apart, might be connected. Investigators working to solve the crimes feared the killer might strike again.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: The Farm
programme.desc: A murder outside of Pleasantville, Iowa divides a family and forces one man to take the investigation into his own hands.

programme.title: Dateline: Dreams and Nightmares: The Meek Mill Story
programme.desc: Rapper Meek Mill discusses the criminal justice system and law enforcement with Lester Holt in his first television interview since being released from prison.

programme.title: Dateline: The Motive
programme.desc: A young woman finds out that her boyfriend might have shot and killed a college football player out of revenge. She struggles with coming forward to officials, fearing she could lose her life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young mother and her son are found dead in a house fire. Police suspected foul play. A confession led to a guilty verdict, but what really happened during the interrogation. This is an extraordinary look inside the interview room.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Client
programme.desc: Beverly Carter, a beloved mother, wife and a successful real estate broker had a long list of clients. Then she vanished. Like all-too-many missing persons cases, police knew it was a race against time to find her, before it was too late.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Quiet One
programme.desc: A beautiful woman thought she'd found her prince charming but their story turned out to be anything but a fairy tale. He was downstairs with the kids while she was upstairs in the bath. Then it happened; was it an accident or murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets
programme.desc: Charlie Tan was an Ivy Leaguer with a bright future but then, Charlie's dad was killed. Police were told one story but the evidence was telling another.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: A couple's romantic boat trip turns tragic when a young wife is lost at sea. The case was cold for years until a model with a checkered past goes undercover to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Mom: Finger Guns and a Beef Bourguignon

programme.title: Movie: Spy

programme.title: Movie: The Fault in Our Stars

programme.title: Movie: Thoroughbreds

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Neutral Zone

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Child

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering 1/5th of the earth's surface, the arctic tundra is one of the coldest and driest places on the planet. The piercing sub-zero temperatures and powerful winds of the arctic tundra challenges even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Follow a year in the Taiga Forest, a frozen forest containing one third of the world's tree that spans right around the globe: across North America, Scandinavia, and extending across Siberia to the shores of the Pacific, sheltering majestic animals.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Land of Fire
programme.desc: Explore the fiery heart of Hawaii, from volcanic eruptions to spiders that smile, fish that climb and turtles that bury secrets in a landscape that defies expectations.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Secrets of the Deep

programme.title: Wild Bahamas: Enchanted Seas
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest natural habitats in the world lie past the sandy beaches of the Bahamans. This is home to many remarkable species.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Aliens of the Forest

programme.desc: This episode features channel signs, wetsuits, and aluminum aircraft.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Wheeling and Dealing
programme.desc: Feb. 24, 1996, Frank Black Jr., the owner of a school bus company, goes missing. The FBI needs to determine if he is dead, and where's his body? It's a mystery built on lies that can only be solved when someone is brave enough, to tell the truth.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Before Vegas
programme.desc: August 7, 2000, Casey Tiner and her boyfriend TJ Steele disappear. At first, people believe they ran away. But as time passes and the young couple never reappear, their families and the police realize someone is lying.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Who Killed the Co-ed? An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 19-year-old college student Faith Hedgepeth is found brutally murdered in her off campus apartment, the evidence leads police to believe that she knew her killer. Six years later Faith's murderer is still at large.

programme.title: What Happened to Stephanie Crane?
programme.desc: October 11, 1993 is a day that the town of Challis, Idaho will never forget; 9-year-old Stephanie Crane disappeared on her way home from a bowling alley, never to be seen again. Police are hoping advances in technology may help finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: American Monster: Stages of Grief
programme.desc: In suburban California, an intruder brutally attacks and kills Joan Dawley. As the Dawley family grieves, it's up to LAPD detectives to crack the case. Secret home movies uncover a shocking tale of deceit, and a monster lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Who Killed the Co-ed? An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 19-year-old college student Faith Hedgepeth is found brutally murdered in her off campus apartment, the evidence leads police to believe that she knew her killer. Six years later Faith's murderer is still at large.

programme.title: What Happened to Stephanie Crane?
programme.desc: October 11, 1993 is a day that the town of Challis, Idaho will never forget; 9-year-old Stephanie Crane disappeared on her way home from a bowling alley, never to be seen again. Police are hoping advances in technology may help finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Brittany Murphy: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Drugs, disease and scandals when Hollywood superstar Brittany Murphy dies at age 32, the world is stunned. Many believe foul play must be involved. Brittany's father searches for answers as lurid allegations against other family members mount.

programme.title: Shattered: Welcome to Santa Claus
programme.desc: December 1997. Santa Claus, Georgia. A ten-year-old girl is kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the night. A woman fears something terrible has happened at her friend's home. A deputy on a routine welfare check discovers a house of horrors.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Bad To The Bone
programme.desc: These women are all 'bad to the bone,' so it's only a matter of time before they turn deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sacrifice Their Blood
programme.desc: These deadly women will do whatever it takes to have their own needs met, even if it means destroying their family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Total Control
programme.desc: Some women must always get their way. A seductress has men and women under her spell, a churchgoer finds a new form of faith, and a matriarch rules with an iron rod.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Leaves Town
programme.desc: With hearts of stone, these Deadly Women give their men special send-offs when 'Love Leaves Town.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Match Made for Murder
programme.desc: When a woman wants more from her husband than he can give, their marriage can be a dangerous union.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: To get away with murder, sometimes the best disguise is a smile. With charm and a kind word, these Deadly Women hide in plain sight, daring the law to 'Catch me, if you Can'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Sometimes, a woman has a killer instinct when she meets her other half. These wicked women exert control over their partners to become the master puppeteer of a murderous plot.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Tunnel of Hate
programme.desc: An industrious woman and an ambitious man become neighbors when they buy adjoining houses. Both intend to restore the derelict homes to former glory, but when one of the renovations falls badly behind, it leads to conflict and a shocking murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Monkey in the Middle
programme.desc: A man finds himself living between hostile neighbors on both sides, including a former marine with severe PTSD. Their campaign of intimidation ramps up to the point of no return, ending with a deadly confrontation on the street outside their homes.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home
programme.desc: The kings create a resort in a family's backyard that includes a waterfall grotto with a slide and infinity edge. Additional elements include a splash pad and sun shelf, transforming the yard from barren to beautiful.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' Pools
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew travel to Tampa to build the most epic, adrenaline-filled backyard pool to date. He creates two pools in one backyard with a nearly nine-foot high spa, two in-pool pergolas and the first-ever fire feature inside a grotto.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' Pools
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny House, Mountain Vistas
programme.desc: A man builds a tiny house on his best friend's property near the Continental Divide in Black Hawk, CO. Having this tiny home will allow the friends to spend more time in nature and create lasting memories in this outdoorsman's paradise.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Newlywed Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds start off their new life together minimally and cost-effectively by going tiny in Salmon, ID.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: After feeling the need to downsize and live simply, a woman and her best friend decide to build a tiny home in the jungle paradise of Hilo, HI. While their dreams of a tiny Hawaiian hideaway are big, both lack adequate construction experience.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Temple Abode
programme.desc: A family of four considers Maui, Hawaii, pure paradise for adventuring and relaxing, so they build their own 'heart of the earth' tiny home based on the Balinesean architectural style. This home combines sustainable materials and hand-carved details.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Ocean View Open House
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler are ready to sell the first house they ever built in Hawaii, but the Ocean View house needs some freshening up first, including replacing a rotted-out back lanai.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Refreshing Pool Renovation
programme.desc: The Dickinsons revitalize an algae-filled pool. Diandra finds the perfect glass tile to replace the outdated ceramic waterline tiles, while Tyler fixes the cracked pool deck and builds a stained Douglas fir fence around it.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dude, Where's My Carb?
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes on the Porter County Fair in Indiana, where a pile of locally sourced pork is served three ways in a single dish.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes in for a full day of over-the-top, smothered goodness. Indulgent in every bite, these dishes range from drool-worthy, savory and sumptuous meals to mouthwatering, sticky, sweet and syrupy desserts.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.desc: In Austin, we find a unique spin on sweet treats at every turn. Sugar Mama's Bakeshop serves up sweet surprises like old-fashioned chocolate malted milkshake cupcakes and shortbread unicorns with edible glitter.

programme.desc: We're on the hunt for the best sweet treats New York City has to offer. Sweets by Chloe is a cute vegan bakeshop that's creating giant cookies and fudge cakes that are rich and moist, creamy and chocolatey.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Royal Showstopper

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Rock n' Roll Caricature
programme.desc: Ben rocks a caricature cake covered in 19 pounds of sugar paste while Karisha surprises a bride with a working water fountain.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Holograms Take the Cake
programme.desc: Detail master Suzanne individually hand-sculpts 500 realistic sugar flowers and Eloise goes round-and-round bringing magic to a one-year old's birthday party.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Nightmare Delivery
programme.desc: Molly plunges into a scuba dog diving cake while baker Ben creates an edible beer barrel cake with a working tap. Meanwhile, Karisha faces her worst delivery yet.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Doughnut Dumbbells and a Wine Fountain Cake
programme.desc: A fountain of wine pours from an edible bottle for a vineyard party, and two brothers celebrate their engagements with a towering, colorful elephant cake. Exercise is sweet when the dumbbells look like doughnuts.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Cookies and Feather Cakes
programme.desc: An artist's style turns edible when one baker sculpts a sweet wonderland, then the Los Angeles Cookie Con gets a special treat that's stacked higher than the attendees' heads.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Ostriches, Tacos and Groundhogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: A flightless bird of epic proportions comes to life in Dallas while taco fillings are piled high on a giant confectionary shell. Next, it's an extraordinary Sweet 16 when the birthday girl's face is reimagined on a cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Levitating, Robotic Cake
programme.desc: A levitating wedding cake amazes a room full of guests while a shiny robot cake makes waves in New Jersey. Later, working hydraulics take a car-shaped cake up a notch and a five-foot-tall cake makes a wedding display like no other.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride: Wedding Bells
programme.desc: Newly engaged Nick and Molly are looking forward to their big day. After their overbooked wedding venue reserves the wrong date, they have six weeks to plan the wedding of their dreams.

programme.title: Movie: Over the Moon in Love
programme.desc: With her match-making business on the verge of closing, Brooklyn finds herself in the unique position to be featured in a magazine. But first, she has to set up the writer with her childhood friend Devin.

programme.title: Movie: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her wish. She has a glimpse into her future which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Cancelled

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes

programme.title: South Park: Here Comes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Return of Substitute

programme.title: Key & Peele: .

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain
