programme.title: Movie: Stolen By My Mother: The Kamiyah Mobley Story
programme.desc: After a miscarriage, a young woman poses as a nurse and steals a mother's baby leading to a lifetime of uncertainty.

programme.title: Movie: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: Four siblings who, after their father's unexpected death, are convinced by their mother to hide in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune. When her visits wane, the children are left to endure their grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.desc: Scott buys a tiny condo unit in a low-income neighborhood, but soon finds out the payoff isn't going to come easy.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Reptile House
programme.desc: Scott buys a dilapidated house that is unexpectedly occupied by some creepy cold-blooded creatures.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Double Down
programme.desc: Justin surprises the team with the news that he already bought a zombie house that he wants them to flip, a small, single-story home that should take only a few weeks to remodel.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: This Place Is Nuts
programme.desc: When Justin gets sick, Keith, Ashlee, and Duke have to decide on their own whether or not to take on this house without a kitchen.

programme.title: Sell This House!: If the House Is A-Round Rockin'
programme.desc: A mother-son homeowner’s large house just cannot sell. This home hits all the right notes online, but in person the yellow and brown walls and musical instruments all over the house turn off potential buyers.

programme.title: Sell This House!: Wrapped Up in Wallpaper
programme.desc: Tanya Memme has her hands full trying to save a Texas home that has attracted interest online with its sweet and old-fashioned charm, but still has zero offers.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A suspected murderer slashes his own throat in court; a foul-mouthed defendant lets loose on the judge; a young woman tries to save the life of the man who is suing her family; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A mourning father makes a desperate attempt to attack his daughter's killer; a judge takes off his robe to help subdue an unruly defendant; a defendant tries to sing his way to a lighter sentence.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering his five young children faces their mother in court; a prolific armed robber unleashes a nasty surprise when he is sentenced; a defendant meets his infant son for the very first time in court; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant leaps over a balcony headfirst in a death-defying escape attempt. A 19-year-old escaped defendant leads police on a high-speed chase with devastating results.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 3
programme.desc: Two mismatched detectives travel to Paris to infiltrate an international crime syndicate.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Big Craft Show
programme.desc: Mary, Deb, Tammi, Dale and the rest of the Tirdy Works team heads to a craft show in New Hampshire in search of a market hungry for her art.

programme.title: Tirdy Works: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: After her moose video goes viral, Mary focuses full time on making Tirdy Works a viable business. Her partner Deb gives her an ultimatum: make the business profitable by the end of winter or quit.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Tis' the Season

programme.title: You Can Do Better: Rolling the Dice
programme.desc: Find out who's who on the casino floor and how to get comped. Plus, Matthew and Abbi try scratch-off tickets, a day at the races, and daily fantasy sports.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Swimming in Hacks
programme.desc: The amount of times Kevin has tried and failed to hack a swimming pool. The city that has a love affair with bagels.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacks for Work and Play

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Hacking the Home and Beyond
programme.desc: Find out which outdoor chore helps Brooke keep the rage at bay, what the first tennis balls were made of and which host was a high school track star.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: Movie: Coyote Ugly
programme.desc: A shy aspiring songwriter comes out of her shell while working at a popular New York bar.

programme.title: Movie: It's Complicated
programme.desc: While attending their son's graduation in New York, a divorced couple rediscovers their feelings for each other. They later return to their homes believing that their affair is over, but soon find themselves continuing the relationship.

programme.title: House: Failure to Communicate
programme.desc: A journalist collapses at his editor's retirement party and hits his head on a table. When he regains consciousness, he is unable to form coherent sentences and he is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: House: Need to Know
programme.desc: A young housewife on fertility medication is brought to the hospital when her inexplicable muscle flailing causes her to crash her car. House and Stacy return from Baltimore with a rekindled relationship.

programme.title: House: Distractions
programme.desc: House and his team face a difficult challenge when a young man with severe burns has unusual activity in his blood tests. The team must get very creative to figure out how to test the patient before his body begins to shut down.

programme.title: House: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Dr. House treats a teenage supermodel for heroin addiction, he uncovers a startling secret about the girl. Meanwhile, Wilson hopes that House's increased leg pain indicates that his leg nerves are regenerating.

programme.title: House: Sex Kills
programme.desc: When Henry experiences a seizure but is not aware of it while it's happening, House takes on the case. The team's differential diagnosis points to a bacterial infection, but Henry suffers a heart attack before the treatment is able to work.

programme.title: House: Clueless
programme.desc: House and his team take on a new patient who comes to Princeton Plainsboro Teaching Hospital after suffering from a breathing attack while role-playing in the bedroom with his wife. All the symptoms point to heavy metal poisoning, but the tests do not.

programme.title: House: Safe
programme.desc: Melinda, a teenage girl who is immunocompromised as a result of medications she's taking after a heart transplant, has a severe allergic reaction and goes into shock despite living in a 'clean room.' House and the team try to figure out what happened.

programme.title: House: All In
programme.desc: A six-year-old boy is brought in exhibiting symptoms that resemble those of a former patient who died. Racing the clock, House uses the previous case to help determine the boy's illness.

programme.title: House: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: A young woman named Hannah hasn't been able to sleep for 10 days, and is brought in after she downed an entire bottle of sleeping pills and still didn't fall asleep. Cameron accuses Foreman of stealing a medical journal article she wrote.

programme.title: House: House vs. God
programme.desc: House takes the case when Boyd, a 15-year-old faith healer, is admitted and claims he can talk to God. House thinks the kid is a clever con until the boy touches one of Wilson's cancer patients and causes her cancer to go into remission.

programme.title: House: Euphoria
programme.desc: A wounded police officer with uncontrollable laughter has House and the team baffled. When Foreman starts showing the same symptoms and the officer's illness takes a fatal turn, they must race to figure out the cause before it's too late.

programme.title: House: Euphoria
programme.desc: The police officer is dead and Foreman continues to experience the same dire progression of symptoms: blindness, muscle contractures and excruciating pain. As Foreman's body fails, it seems the only choice left is a dangerous brain biopsy.

programme.title: House: Forever
programme.desc: When a young mother suffers a seizure while bathing her child, it causes the near drowning of her newborn son. House and the team race to find out what's wrong with her while simultaneously trying to bring her infant back to life.

programme.title: House: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: A 16-year-old Hurricane Katrina victim suffering from hallucinations about the tragedy is brought to House by his ex-bandmate Crandall, who tells House she's his daughter. House takes the case despite feeling more pain than usual in his leg.

programme.title: House: No Reason
programme.desc: As House and his team work on the diagnosis of Vince, a man with a giant swollen tongue, disgruntled former patient Jack Moriarty walks into House's office and shoots him. House continues to treat Vince from his hospital bed in the ICU.

programme.title: Movie: Easy A
programme.desc: A high school student uses a rumour about losing her virginity to raise her social standing and make money.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Standing Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy finds a slice of history all over the country starting at Santa Barbara to Dallas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Knockouts
programme.desc: Guy's traveling up and down the west coast in search of funky neighbourhood joints.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cookin' It Old School
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers three joints putting' a piece of history on the table: In New Orleans, an oyster bar where nothing's changed since 1919 and the deep fried oysters are still hand-shucked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches for great joints where they're frying up a storm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food and Bon Bons
programme.desc: Guy rolls coast to coast looking for flavour, and finds it in the most interesting places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners You Sent Me To
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads for three great diners that viewers recommended to him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taking a tasty tour through Tuscany, Italy. In Montecatini Alto, a hillside seafood spot serves up a squid ink specialty and a Mediterranean prawn-artichoke mash up.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way
programme.desc: In Honolulu, Hawaii, there is a 48-year-old drive-in where burgers and dogs come with rice and macaroni salad. In Nashville, Tenn., a Jamaican cafeteria at the farmer's market serves mango chutney chicken and curried goat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers great food in some unexpected places, including a bowling alley, a car wash and Laundromat in Austin and a historic neighbourhood grocery store in Atlanta with fried quail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Like Mama Made
programme.desc: Guy travels to St. Louis where a former backup singer is serving old school soul food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soups and Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is on the search the best comfort foods, such as a bacon blue cheeseburger.

programme.desc: Valerie's always been a football fan, but today Valerie's longtime friend, Lisa, and her husband, former baseball player Billy Ashley, are going to show Valerie how much fun baseball culture can be.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Savor Summer's Flavors
programme.desc: The Kitchen is savouring the season with recipes showcasing summer produce. Katie Lee makes her grilled teriyaki steak and plums. Then, Sunny Anderson assembles a fresh and flavourful heirloom tomato and pesto tart.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Italian Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her love of an Italian meal by cooking up a menu filled with an abundance of flavour and memories. She invites her neighbour, Kathy, to help, and Trisha learns how to make fresh pasta from scratch!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Date Night
programme.desc: It's date night on the farm! Molly Yeh makes a romantic dinner for husband Nick, including juicy steak salad with a bright za'atar chimichurri, the best cheesy garlic babka muffins and blood orange amaretto sours.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 2
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up delicious anytime breakfasts with the kids. They make a one-pan Dutch baby, five minute granola made in a skillet and an Indian bread omelet. Ree also makes a trendy Dalgona coffee.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Ree uses a multicooker to turn seriously delicious short ribs with collards into fast food, and she punches up the flavor in her spicy Brussels Caesar salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Hot and Spicy Celebration
programme.desc: The Kitchen is heating up with hot and spicy recipes. Jeff Mauro brings the heat to the grill with his apricot habanero pork chops and Katie Lee trades marinara for buffalo sauce in her cheesy spicy buffalo chicken calzone.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Georgia Gals
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood hosts singer Caylee Hammack to share stories of their roots and indulge in a menu that takes them back to their days in Georgia.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Jeffrey's Faves
programme.desc: Jaffrey's favourites are in the spotlight as Ina celebrates the food he loves. There's his new Friday night fav, fried chicken sandwiches, perfect to kick start the weekend.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner Cook-Off
programme.desc: Chefs are cooking every meal on the menu: breakfast, lunch and dinner. First, they must make a sweet and savoury breakfast from items found in the store's clearance carts. Then, a family lunch is complicated by a red light special.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Stars: Flavortown Flips Over the Judges
programme.desc: Guy Fieri turns the tables on the show's All-Star judges by making Richard Blais, G. Garvin, Beau MacMillan and Aarti Sequeira compete in the kitchen!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Stars: Catch A Shopping Star

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Stars and A-Lister Dinners

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Angler, Jeremy Wade sets his sights on an aggressive far eastern predator that's now invading America's backyards. Accused of homicide and said to breathe air and crawl on land, the snakehead is a monster that sounds more like a gangster than a fish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Tales of a body-snatching spirit called the Water Mama have reached Jeremy. With people disappearing without a trace, Jeremy is convinced there is a real river monster lurking behind the legend.

programme.title: River Monsters: River of Blood
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to remote wetlands to investigate reports of a brutal riverside mutilation where he comes face to face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighters and uncovers the slasher stalking Argentina's River of Blood.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Deadliest Encounters
programme.desc: For angler Jeremy Wade uncovering the truth about freshwater killers is a passion that can spill over into dangerous obsession. In this Special edition of River Monsters he re-lives his close calls, from wrestling Whaler Sharks to wrangling Wolf fish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels the globe and risks his life to find some of the most mysterious freshwater predators. He is on a mission to test the myths that surround these creatures.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Operation Croc Rescue
programme.desc: Animal expert Forrest Galante takes a break from his mission of finding extinct animals to rescue a giant crocodile with a motorcycle tire trapped around its neck, traveling to Indonesia in hopes to save its life.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates his most disturbing case yet when he is faced with the story of a man who had his face ripped off in a remote Bolivian river. The journey through dangerous jungle ends with a confrontation with one of his oldest adversaries.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Operation Croc Rescue
programme.desc: Animal expert Forrest Galante takes a break from his mission of finding extinct animals to rescue a giant crocodile with a motorcycle tire trapped around its neck, traveling to Indonesia in hopes to save its life.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Angler, Jeremy Wade sets his sights on an aggressive far eastern predator that's now invading America's backyards. Accused of homicide and said to breathe air and crawl on land, the snakehead is a monster that sounds more like a gangster than a fish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Tales of a body-snatching spirit called the Water Mama have reached Jeremy. With people disappearing without a trace, Jeremy is convinced there is a real river monster lurking behind the legend.

programme.title: River Monsters: River of Blood
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to remote wetlands to investigate reports of a brutal riverside mutilation where he comes face to face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighters and uncovers the slasher stalking Argentina's River of Blood.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Penguin Parent Drama
programme.desc: Spring is in the air at Chester Zoo and many of the animals are giving birth. Penguin parents Indigo and Amber are bringing up their new chicks, Munch and McCoy. But an outbreak of disease in the colony leaves Munch fighting for his life.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Negotiations
programme.desc: On chimp island, the group are wielding a large stick. Keeper Niall attempts to negotiate with eldest chimp Boris for its return, but Boris is wary of dominant male Dylan stealing his reward, and plays hardball with Niall.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Porcupine on the Loose!
programme.desc: Porcupines Roxie and Henning have had a new baby porcupette, but living alongside eleven meerkats means that the new arrival will need to stay calm. Also, when he finally plucks up the courage to face the mob, he ends up on an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Turf War
programme.desc: A power struggle unfolds on chimp island as dominant male Dylan is challenged by young pretender Carlos.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Otterly Love
programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears

programme.desc: Florida State University-alumni charter guests arrive single and more than ready to mingle with the crew. Meanwhile, Simone is out of her element working on service and becomes distracted by her new crush. Kevin undermines Kate following a complaint.

programme.title: Below Deck: A Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: The new deckhand arrives just in time as Brian's injured knee worsens. Ashton tries to ingratiate the new teammate with the deck crew, but his efforts are wasted after an explosive crew night out. Kate and Kevin battle over the control of meal service.

programme.title: Below Deck: 12 Seconds in Heaven
programme.desc: Rhylee jeopardizes her job and relationships with the crew after a dramatic first night out. Tanner gossips about his relationship with Simone as things heat up between them. Still sidelined by his leg injury, Brian gets sent to the hospital.

programme.title: Below Deck: Everyone Hates Kate
programme.desc: The crew bonds over a trip to an elephant sanctuary, but Kate's attitude pushes the others to the brink. A day off at the beach club has Courtney protective over Brian. Simone learns Tanner has been gossiping about their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: I'm Sorry You Feel That Way
programme.desc: Tanner gives Simone mixed signals by telling her that he just wants to keep things casual, while Ashton tries to squash his beef with Kate after their heated argument the night before. Kate promotes Courtney to second stew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Yacht-pocalypse Now

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Below Deck: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Kevin spirals out in response to charter guest, and professional chef, Justine telling him to 'step it up.' Much to Ashton's dismay, Kate returns and interferes in the deck team's drama. Simone sets out to become a better Second Stew.

programme.title: Snapped: Eve Nance
programme.desc: When a beloved Wisconsin father disappears, his wife blames drugs, but close friends suspect a violent confrontation that ended a marriage filled with secrets.

programme.title: Snapped: Martha Ann McClancy
programme.desc: A churchgoing southern woman loses her husband to tragedy, but a cloud of suspicion haunts her new marriage and leads investigators to a new conclusion.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Barajas
programme.desc: A violent home invasion leads to suspicion about the victim's stepdaughter and a mystery man, but a startling confession reveals a more intimate betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Collar and Leash Killer
programme.desc: A string of women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash. Detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: The Broderick Files: Betty Broderick
programme.desc: A look back at one of the most riveting cases of the 1990s: the Betty Broderick murders.

programme.title: Snapped: Shelia Eddy
programme.desc: A family searches for a missing teen only to find out she’s been betrayed by her closest friends.

programme.title: Snapped: Julia Phillips
programme.desc: A woman is attached and her wealthy lover killed, but police soon question her story.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna Hayes
programme.desc: A woman goes to deadly extremes to help her son win a custody battle with his ex.

programme.title: Snapped: Ellen Snyder
programme.desc: A mother-son relationship is tested when a murder comes between them.

programme.title: Snapped: Shanterrica Madden
programme.desc: Popular college basketball player's clash with studious roommate ends in tragedy.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Beth Harshbarger
programme.desc: Wife shoots her husband during family hunting trip; questioned whether accident.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Last Call Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans. The 'Last Call Killer' hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: An Eye For Murder
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed. Police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose. Two rookies are on the trail of a man with a Psycho-esque mother, a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Pattern of Murder
programme.desc: A killer hijacks the highways of Sacramento as several women are found strangled with their clothing cut into precise but odd patterns. A survivor leads police to a sports car driving deviant posing as a good samaritan to poach potential victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Smell of Death
programme.desc: A rash of young men go missing around Chicago during the 1970's. When bodies start washing up in the river a pattern emerges. A small piece of evidence leads police to the house of a model citizen where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Williamson
programme.desc: A deadly shooting raises questions about an elderly man's business dealings and his friendship with a much younger woman.

programme.title: Snapped: Misook Wang
programme.desc: While a community searches for a missing businesswoman, police uncover a shocking dispute with a money-hungry relative that they hope will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitney Harris
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend’s murderous plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Bruno
programme.desc: The peaceful life of a retired North Carolina couple is shattered when a husband's body is found in his own garage, leaving investigators to sort out fact from fiction with the help of his wife.

programme.title: Cold Justice: The Widow
programme.desc: Kelly and her team tackle one of their most emotional cases yet involving the murder of a beautiful college student killed in her bedroom while packing for a trip to visit her parents for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Movie: Thank You for Your Service
programme.desc: Three soldiers who fought side by side in Iraq return home to resume their lives with their loved ones, but find that the horrors of war have come home with them. They struggle to resume their old lives while dealing with the effects of PTSD.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family, and proceeds to try and live a double life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Dancing as Fat as I Can
programme.desc: Homer angers Marge by binging their favourite show without her, and has to pick up a new skill in order to make amends. Meanwhile, Bart prepares to compete in 'Krusty's Holiday Trample.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Krusty reveals the untold story of his past in his movie 'The Sands of Space.' While working as personal assistants on the movie, Bart and Lisa learn about the early years of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Itchy & Scratchy
programme.desc: Krusty releases an all-female reboot of 'Itchy and Scratchy,' so Bart and his male friends decide to boycott the show. After Bart's friends turn on him for laughing at the reboot, Bart joins a group of girls who commit crimes against patriarchy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band
programme.desc: Lisa is scouted by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic, to her band teacher's dismay. Homer works extra shifts at the plant so Lisa can play, putting strain on the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh
programme.desc: Marge becomes Director of Springfield's local theater, armed with Lisa's script resembling 'Hamilton.' Meanwhile, Homer joins a baby class with Maggie, where he takes a liking to supervisor Chloe.

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh Canada
programme.desc: On a family vacation to Niagara Falls, Lisa is mistakenly granted political asylum in Canada. When Marge goes to rescue Lisa, they are forced to re-evaluate their love for America as they navigate the polite Canadian landscape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Woo-Hoo Dunnit
programme.desc: When the secret stack of cash aka Lisa's college fund Marge keeps under the sink goes missing, the documentary crime series 'Deadline Springfield' goes in-depth to solve the case, leaving no stone unturned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Crystal Blue-Haired Persuasion
programme.desc: After Homer's work cuts children's healthcare benefits, Marge turns to buying healing crystals as a cheaper solution for Bart's ADD. Bart begins to succeed in school, prompting Marge to open her very own crystals empire.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Bed, Bob and Beyond
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day fight between Bob and Linda has the kids feeling confused. After a failed attempt to see a movie, it’s up to Tina, Louise and Gene to tell their own story as a distraction from the awkward tension.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Every Which Way But Goose
programme.desc: Tina, discouraged by not being asked to prom by Jimmy Jr., forms an unhealthy attachment to a goose from the nearby park. Meanwhile, Linda joins a dating app to help Gretchen find a match.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bri, Robot
programme.desc: Brian worries about the legacy he's leaving behind, so Stewie makes a robot duplicate as a living biography.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trans-Fat
programme.desc: Peter is mistakenly identified as transgender, which leads to an unexpected event and an important learning lesson.

programme.title: Archer: Pipeline Fever
programme.desc: While Malory tries to make ISIS a green workplace, Archer and Lana head to the Louisiana bayous to prevent a dangerous eco-terrorist from bombing America's largest natural gas pipeline.

programme.title: Archer: The Double Deuce
programme.desc: When members of Woodhouse's famed WWI Royal Flying Corps squadron start dying mysteriously, he naturally suspects foul play. As does Archer, who tries to help his loyal manservant track down the killer.

programme.desc: A convicted murderer awaits his sentence, another inmate turns up with a pair of black eyes, and we take you to the one place in the entire jail where drama is seldom in short supply, 'Mod Q' which houses a variety of protective custody inmates.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street

programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness
programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.title: Murder in the Smokies
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the Carter family calls the Smoky Mountains their home. But when their picture-perfect lives are rocked by a murder, paradise is lost.

programme.title: Little Boy Lost: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Jealousy, heartbreak and deceit. When 7-year-old Kyron Horman vanishes, investigators suspect his stepmother had a hand in his disappearance. In this one-hour special, Kyron's mother searches for answers as the family saga takes many bizarre turns.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Horror I Don't Remember
programme.desc: Sherry Shafer never had a good relationship with her younger brother, Brian Britton, but she never expected to lose everything because of him. Today, all she has left is the fear that one day he will return to finish what he started 26 years ago.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Little Boy Lost: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Jealousy, heartbreak and deceit. When 7-year-old Kyron Horman vanishes, investigators suspect his stepmother had a hand in his disappearance. In this one-hour special, Kyron's mother searches for answers as the family saga takes many bizarre turns.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Murder in the Smokies
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the Carter family calls the Smoky Mountains their home. But when their picture-perfect lives are rocked by a murder, paradise is lost.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: What's Mine Is Mine
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Central Florida, a jilted wife, hell-bent on revenge, commits a grisly crime, but later pays the price. And later, a toxic mix of lust, greed and pride turns the promising start of a new marriage into a living hell.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Spider's Kiss
programme.desc: A self-made mogul retires to Florida to live out his life in luxury. When his relationship sours, the days in the sun are numbered. Then, well-loved lawman's dream life ensnares him in a gold-digger's lethal web of lies.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Doctor Ordered
programme.desc: A hotshot surgeon on vacation with his girlfriend divulges a dark plot to murder his ex-wife.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Shattered: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: 1981. A teenager forms a search party to find his missing 5-year-old sister. 1995. A mother frantically searches for her young son who disappears while playing near the river, and an officer prays when she recognizes the prime suspect in both cases.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Shattered: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: 1993. Rockville, MD. A woman is shocked to discover her sister and nephew killed in cold blood... unwittingly, a daughter becomes a pawn in a dark and brutal murder plot... and a prosecutor makes it his personal mission to bring a killer to justice.

programme.title: Shattered: The Darkside
programme.desc: Brandi McClain falls in love with a handsome and famous skateboarder known as 'Gator.' Though Gator claims to find God with the help of a well-meaning preacher, no one knows that his dark side lurks dangerously close to the surface.

programme.title: The Interrogator: You Know What Time It Is
programme.desc: A mother of two is shot to death outside her apartment complex just minutes after returning home from her 30th birthday celebration. After interviewing multiple witnesses and suspects, Detective Fil Waters uncovers a shocking lead caught on video.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Overkill
programme.desc: A young woman finds her beloved neighbour, Rebecca Claybrook, beaten to death in her own home. The men in Claybrook's life are put under the microscope by Detective Fil Waters.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Southern Treats
programme.desc: In the land of Dixie, see how a few of the favorite sweet Southern treats are made. Watch GooGoo Clusters take a bath in chocolate; Red Bird Peppermint Puffs earn their stripes, and find out the sweet secret behind Carolina Foods' Honeybun.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meaty Marvels
programme.desc: In Palatine, IL, Greg and Kristina create Brazilian-style barbecue at Rockin Rodizio.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Revolutionary Roasts
programme.desc: Mass. Roger puts the pedal to the metal on Chef Jeremy Stanton's 'Rotisserie Bike.'

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy Contraptions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes from the west coast to east coast to check out crazy contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Robot/ PJ Power Up
